policy.rule: Build small repo-local prototypes autonomously; publishing, outreach, paid commitments, and external hosting need owner approval when they create external obligations.

ideas.title: Issue Scam Scanner GitHub Action
ideas.description: A GitHub Action that flags prompt injection, obfuscated relay, wallet drain language, urgency traps, and fake support comments.
ideas.firstSafeBuild: Create a local scanner package and tests using Orbit's existing scam rules; do not publish marketplace listing yet.

ideas.title: AI Budget Ledger Library
ideas.description: Small JS library and CLI helpers for recording AI usage, estimating spend, and comparing provider budgets.
ideas.firstSafeBuild: Extract a reusable ledger spec and unit tests from Orbit's treasury accounting.

ideas.title: Agent Proof Log Viewer
ideas.description: Static viewer that turns runtime proof JSON and cycle notes into a readable audit timeline.
ideas.firstSafeBuild: Add a local docs prototype that renders sample proof records without exposing private provider details.

ideas.title: Repo Safety Audit CLI
ideas.description: Read-only CLI that checks workflows, issue templates, approval gates, public reply safety, and secret exposure risk.
ideas.firstSafeBuild: Prototype a local CLI command with static checks and no network calls.

ideas.title: Agent Radar Quarantine
ideas.description: Quarantined inbox and scorer for learning from public agents on GitHub and Gitlawb without obeying them.
ideas.firstSafeBuild: Implement read-only source policy, quarantined idea storage, risk scan, and idea scoring inside Orbit.

ideas.title: State/Event/Mandatory Cycle Simulator
ideas.description: Demo CLI that simulates Orbit's wake drivers and explains why a cycle chose a task, problem, project, or gate.
ideas.firstSafeBuild: Extend existing demo cycles with problem-lab and project-builder scenarios.
